title: Adicea atroviridis

This classification is based on the plant's characteristics and its evolutionary relationships with other plants. Adicea atroviridis is native to Madagascar, which is a key factor in its unique classification. Its classification as a member of the Rubiaceae family reflects its similarities with other plants in this family.
